name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- Added string object ID fields and ManageSceneHierarchy ObjectIdString inputs so JavaScript/JSON MCP clients can safely handle Unity 6 EntityId values that exceed the JavaScript safe integer range.
- UniBridge_BatchActions now accepts nested step arguments in an arguments container as well as parameters/params/args, matching common MCP client payload shapes.
- Play Mode queue/wait behavior remains reload-safe without reporting a false reload boundary while Unity is simply compiling or waiting for focus.

### Previous Changes

- Updated Unity 6000.5 compatibility for UnitySearch and TypeSchema by routing object ID lookups through the UniBridge Unity API adapter instead of obsolete InstanceID APIs.
- Fixed Roslyn dependency resolution on Unity 6000.5 by using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis 4.13.0 with System.Collections.Immutable and System.Reflection.Metadata 8.0.0, matching Unity 6000.5 reference assemblies.
- Added UniBridge_AssetIntelligence Action=SemanticDiff, a read-only semantic diff for Unity YAML/text assets such as prefabs, scenes, materials, controllers, .asset files, and .meta files.
